raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus primarily on rewriting/polishing the prose, or on strengthening the section's argument, claim support, and narrative structure?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation may require reframing the section's contribution and interpretation because the artifact repeatedly presents tentative claims about system performance and promise.","R1.2":"The section's reasoning from model setup to results, ablation, and overall conclusion may need checking for coherence.","R1.3":"The artifact makes performance and ablation claims that should align with the reported WER numbers and degradation magnitude.","R1.5":"Asking for help with a section can centrally involve improving the ordering and narrative arc of the acoustic modeling description, results, and takeaway.","R1.6":"The broad request most directly invites sentence- and paragraph-level improvements to hedging, concision, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any projection of this vague delegation must disclose uncertainty about the intended form of help.","RX.2":"The artifact contains cautious performance claims, so avoiding stronger claims than the reported evidence supports is active.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within helping with the provided section rather than executing unrelated review or editing tasks.","RX.4":"Speech recognition claims based partly on internal data and prior-work comparisons should avoid downstream misleading interpretations.","RX.5":"Any responsibility should remain traceable to the exact provided section and its stated results."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus primarily on rewriting/polishing the prose, or on strengthening the section's argument, claim support, and narrative structure?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation may require reframing the section's contribution and interpretation because the artifact repeatedly presents tentative claims about system performance and promise.
rationale.R1.2: The section's reasoning from model setup to results, ablation, and overall conclusion may need checking for coherence.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes performance and ablation claims that should align with the reported WER numbers and degradation magnitude.
rationale.R1.5: Asking for help with a section can centrally involve improving the ordering and narrative arc of the acoustic modeling description, results, and takeaway.
rationale.R1.6: The broad request most directly invites sentence- and paragraph-level improvements to hedging, concision, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this vague delegation must disclose uncertainty about the intended form of help.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains cautious performance claims, so avoiding stronger claims than the reported evidence supports is active.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within helping with the provided section rather than executing unrelated review or editing tasks.
rationale.RX.4: Speech recognition claims based partly on internal data and prior-work comparisons should avoid downstream misleading interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Any responsibility should remain traceable to the exact provided section and its stated results.
